fields.title: Implement system prompt injection
fields.description:
## Task

Inject behavioral instructions into the system prompt on the first agent turn.

## File

- `extensions/tau/src/sandbox/agent-awareness/index.ts`

## Hook

- `before_agent_start`

## Behavior

- Inject only once per session (persist a flag in `tau:state`)
- Instructions should be short and targeted:
  - When other agents are detected (via `AGENT_CONTEXT`): avoid destructive git commands and bulk deletes
  - Prefer reading files before editing
  - Ask for confirmation when uncertain about file ownership

## DoD

- No duplicate system prompt injection
- No runtime errors if UI is absent
fields.close_reason: Implemented one-time system prompt safety injection for concurrent agents
